goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 09:45'.
The train should depart from 'london liverpool street' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
Make sure you get 'departure time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'address', 'phone number', and 'area'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 09:45
The train should depart from london liverpool street and should leave on tuesday
Make sure you get departure time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum
Make sure you get address, phone number, and area
